pages.english_text: Augustine was a happy boy.
pages.image_prompt: A sunny field with green grass under a blue sky. A young boy stands in the center, arms outstretched, smiling joyfully. Bright, flat colors with simple shapes, eye-level angle, warm and cheerful mood.

pages.latin_text: Amābat currere et rīdēre cum amīcīs.
pages.english_text: He loved to run and laugh with friends.
pages.image_prompt: A grassy hill under a clear sky. Three boys chase each other, laughing, in a playful run. Centered composition, eye-level angle, vibrant colors, energetic and happy mood.

pages.english_text: One night, the moon shone brightly.
pages.image_prompt: A night sky with a glowing full moon casting soft light. Stars twinkle faintly. Centered on the moon, slightly above eye-level, cool blue tones, calm and serene mood.

pages.english_text: A pear tree stood beyond the fence.
pages.image_prompt: A wooden fence under moonlight, with a tall pear tree full of fruit on the other side. Green leaves and yellow pears glow softly. Centered on the tree, eye-level angle, quiet and inviting mood.

pages.english_text: The pears were round and shiny.
pages.image_prompt: Close-up of a pear tree branch with round, shiny yellow pears under moonlight. Stars visible in the background. Centered on the pears, eye-level angle, bright and tempting mood.

pages.english_text: "Let’s take the pears!" said the friends.
pages.image_prompt: Three boys huddle near a fence under moonlight, pointing at a pear tree. Mischievous expressions, whispering gestures. Centered on the group, eye-level angle, secretive and excited mood.

pages.english_text: Augustine’s conscience whispered, "Don’t steal."
pages.image_prompt: A young boy stands alone under a starry sky, head tilted as if listening. A faint, glowing cricket silhouette hovers near his shoulder. Centered on the boy, eye-level angle, quiet and introspective mood.

pages.english_text: But he didn’t listen.
pages.image_prompt: A young boy turns away from a glowing cricket silhouette, looking toward a pear tree. Moonlit background with stars. Centered on the boy, eye-level angle, conflicted and curious mood.

pages.english_text: Silently, they went over the fence.
pages.image_prompt: Three boys climb over a wooden fence under moonlight, tiptoeing carefully. Pear tree visible in the background. Centered on the action, slightly above eye-level, sneaky and tense mood.

pages.english_text: They shook the tree. Pears fell!
pages.image_prompt: A pear tree shakes under moonlight, yellow pears falling to the ground. Boys’ hands visible on the trunk. Centered on the tree, eye-level angle, dynamic and chaotic mood.

pages.english_text: They took the fruit and fled,
pages.image_prompt: Three boys run from a pear tree, holding yellow pears, under a starry sky. Fence in the background. Centered on the running boys, eye-level angle, hurried and excited mood.

pages.english_text: and laughing under the stars.
pages.image_prompt: Three boys laugh joyfully, holding pears, running under a starry night sky. Moonlight casts soft glows. Centered on the group, eye-level angle, playful and carefree mood.

pages.english_text: But the pears were not good.
pages.image_prompt: A pile of yellow pears on the ground, some bitten and discarded. Starry sky in the background. Centered on the pears, eye-level angle, disappointing and dim mood.

pages.english_text: They threw the pears to the pigs.
pages.image_prompt: Three pigs eat yellow pears scattered on the ground near a fence. Moonlight illuminates the scene. Centered on the pigs, eye-level angle, content and simple mood.

pages.latin_text: Porcī erant laetī. Augustīnus nōn erat laetus.
pages.english_text: The pigs were happy. Augustine was not.
pages.image_prompt: Three pigs munch pears happily, while a young boy stands nearby, head down, frowning. Moonlit field, starry sky. Centered on the contrast, eye-level angle, sad and reflective mood.

pages.english_text: His conscience was heavy.
pages.image_prompt: A young boy sits on the ground, head in hands, under a starry sky. A faint cricket silhouette glows near him. Centered on the boy, eye-level angle, heavy and somber mood.

pages.english_text: He went home and to bed.
pages.image_prompt: A small house under moonlight, a boy walking toward it with a sad expression. Starry sky above. Centered on the boy and house, eye-level angle, quiet and lonely mood.

pages.english_text: But he couldn’t sleep.
pages.image_prompt: A boy lies in a simple bed, eyes open, staring at the ceiling. Moonlight streams through a window. Centered on the boy, eye-level angle, restless and troubled mood.

pages.latin_text: Tacitē sēdit et ōrāvit: "Domine meus, doleō fūrārī pira et nōn audīre vōcem interiōrem."
pages.english_text: He sat quietly and prayed: "My Lord, I’m sorry for stealing pears and not listening to my inner voice."
pages.image_prompt: A man kneels in a simple room, hands clasped, head bowed in prayer. Soft golden light glows around him. Centered on the man, eye-level angle, solemn and hopeful mood.

pages.latin_text: Augustīnus amōrem Deī in corde sēnsit. Deus eī iamprīdem remīserat.
pages.english_text: Augustine felt God’s love in his heart. God had forgiven him long ago.
pages.image_prompt: A man stands in a simple room, arms raised, smiling peacefully, bathed in warm golden light. A starry sky visible through a window. Centered on the man, eye-level angle, joyful and serene mood.

pages.latin_text: Cum dīcimus, "Mē paenitet, Deus," Deus dīcit, "Remittō tibi!"
pages.english_text: When we say, "I’m sorry, God," God says, "I forgive you!"
pages.image_prompt: A pale, blond boy lies in a white crib, eyes closed, hands folded in prayer. Soft golden light glows around him, with a faint starry sky visible through a window. Centered on the boy, eye-level angle, peaceful and reverent mood.
